title: DNA extraction from soil
author: Tsu-Chun Hung
materials: Measuring 250 mg for a soil sample

steps.title: Add 200 µL of 1mm beads to 2ml enppendorf tube
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of 1mm beads to 2ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Add 200 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of 0.5mm beads to 2ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Add 225 µL of TE buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 225 µL of TE buffer to 2ml enppendorf tube TE buffer is in 4°C fridge

steps.title: Add 375 µL of lysis buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 375 µL of lysis buffer to 2ml enppendorf tube Lysis buffer is in 4°C fridge

steps.title: Take 2ml enppendorf tube out of...
steps.instruction: Take 2ml enppendorf tube out of the laminar flow and transfer soil samples to the 2ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in mixmill...
steps.instruction: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in mixmill for sample crush, at this condition: 30 rpm/s, for 4mins 00:04:00

steps.title: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge for centrifugation, at this condition: 17.0 x g, 25 °C, 3 minutes

steps.title: Add 350 µL of isopropanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL of isopropanol to the 1st well of 96 well plate

steps.title: Add 125 µL of magnetic beads...
steps.instruction: Add 125 µL of magnetic beads (10 mg/ml) to the 1st well of 96 deep well plate Shake the bottle and pipetting before using magnetic beads

steps.title: Add 200 µL of the sample...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of the sample (lysate) from the 2ml centrifuged tube to the 1st well of 96 deep well plate USUALLY ADD at LAST

steps.title: Add 400 µL of isopropanol to...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of isopropanol to the 2nd well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Add 300 µL of 80% enthanol...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of 80% enthanol to the 3rd well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Add 300 µL of 80% enthanol...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of 80% enthanol to the 4th well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Add 100 µL of DD water...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of DD water to the 5th well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Put the prepared 96 deep well...
steps.instruction: Put the prepared 96 deep well plate in the automated DNA extraction machine

steps.title: After the extraction is done, collect...
steps.instruction: After the extraction is done, collect 100 µL of the eluted sample as the DNA template for downstream experiments

steps.title: Add 250 µL 0
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL 0.133M Ammonium acetate in a new 2ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Transfer supernatant 300 µL of step...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant 300 µL of step 8 into 2ml enppendorf tube in step 9

steps.title: Incubate on ice for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate on ice for 00:10:00

steps.title: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge for centrifugation, at this condition: 17.0 x g, 25 °C, 3 minutes

steps.title: Add 200 µL 0
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL 0.06M Aluminium sulfate in another 2ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Transfer step 12 supernatant 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Transfer step 12 supernatant 500 µL in step 13’s 2ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Incubate on ice for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate on ice for 00:10:00

steps.title: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Put 2ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge for centrifugation, at this condition: 17.0 x g, 25 °C, 10 minutes
